mapper.select: SELECT id FROM certification_posts WHERE id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT post_id FROM comments WHERE id = #{commentId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reports (user_id, target_type, target_id, reason, detail) VALUES (#{userId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{reason}, #{detail}) ON CONFLICT (target_type, target_id, user_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT r.id AS id, r.target_type AS targetType, r.target_id AS targetId, r.reason AS reason, r.detail AS detail, r.status AS status, r.user_id AS reporterId, u.nickname AS reporterNickname, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.processed_at AS processedAt FROM reports r INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id WHERE r.status = 'PENDING' AND r.target_type = #{targetType} ORDER BY r.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reports r WHERE r.status = 'PENDING' AND r.target_type = #{targetType}
SELECT id AS id, status AS status, target_type AS targetType, target_id AS targetId FROM reports WHERE id = #{reportId}
mapper.update: UPDATE reports SET status = 'REJECTED', processed_at = now() WHERE id = #{reportId} AND status = 'PENDING'
